最开始故事线只有一条，向上爬，然后出楼，集中度很高，除了20楼的那段时间，也就是大检修，稍微拖沓，后面节奏都很好。两百章，有特级考核，地下组织，医疗处，机动组织，考核层，负二楼，制造处，楼梯间，楼外，运输道，信息层，串联的很好，不是单纯的套娃，印象都很深刻。
51楼管前后，是到现在最大的高潮部分，除了新开的楼外故事线，还有各种隐秘再被提上台面，能吊起来胃口，填坑也及时
听书的，听到只能是个大概，只有故事留了个印象，所以没法怎么关注细节，但是总体的感觉还是比较好的，很推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712843348,"group_id":"7293034428140358718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请输入文本","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5MGKzs+pJqbb8dRgqj+GEl7TQzO3lxCEf/M8O9r9tCk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d19dc0ad6b6e49c7a2326a3997bb4f12~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708535&x-signature=vz23tdT50CxVJyX9uIysQmdpNmo%3D","user_id":"3284994456555751","user_name":"帕塔布"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3284994456555751","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965018,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7293034428140358718","book_info":{"abstract":"【科幻末世+末日求生+无系统+无空间+无女主+不圣母+不装逼】
